description: Manifest written beside EDGP static report bundle indexes.

bundle.description: Optional metadata about the source and command that generated the bundle.

command.description: CLI-style command used to generate the bundle.

sourceKind.description: Public input surface that produced the bundle.

bundleSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the canonical manifest payload excluding this field. Because report entries include member source and HTML digests, this is a portable bundle fingerprint.

index.description: Bundle index HTML file path relative to the bundle directory.

reportCount.description: Number of entries in the reports array.

reports.description: Ordered static reports rendered into the bundle.

href.description: Member HTML report path relative to the bundle directory.

htmlSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the rendered member HTML bytes.

schema.description: EDGP JSON schema identifier for the source report.

source.description: Source JSON path label for this rendered report.

sourceSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the source JSON bytes rendered for this member.

summary.description: Report-specific summary metrics copied from summary or stats fields.

title.description: Human-readable title rendered in the bundle index.

triageSummary.description: Optional generated aggregate triage summary artifact for this bundle.

href.description: Triage summary HTML path relative to the bundle directory.

htmlSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the rendered triage summary HTML bytes.

schema.description: EDGP JSON schema identifier for the generated triage summary.

source.description: Generated triage summary JSON path relative to the bundle directory.

sourceSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the generated triage summary JSON bytes.

summary.description: Aggregate triage summary metrics copied from the generated report.

title.description: Human-readable title rendered in the bundle index.

title: EDGP Report Bundle Manifest v1
